title: Candy Cane Totem!
description: This Texture Pack Makes your totem to a Candy Cane! Have fun!
body:
Have you ever wanted a totem that fits the season? Well, I gotchu! Candy Cane Totem turns your totem into a festive candy cane. It looks amazing and is perfect for the Christmas season. Have fun using it!
— Freepy 🎄

![Candy Cane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faeb617ebbaa0ad4d0fecb28b068a76b2a1fbd64_0.webp)

**!! For This Texture Pack to work, you will need [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) installed.**
